nasb.text: “You shall not do at all what we are doing here today, every man doing whatever is right in his own eyes;

esv.text: “You shall not do according to all that we are doing here today, everyone doing whatever is right in his own eyes,

cnv.text: 我們今日在這裡所行的，是行各人看為正的事，你們將來不可以這樣行；

ccb.text: “你们不可再像今日这样各行其是，
